units.source_text: 年內，第⼀與第⼆級之間轉移的賬⾯總值／名義⾦額淨額為346.88億美元，主要受以下各實體帶動：亞洲實體（318.09億美元），原因是信貸轉差
units.translation_target_text: During the year, the net carrying value/notional amount transferred between Level 1 and Level 2 was US$34.688 billion, driven primarily by the following entities: Asian entities (US$31.809 billion) due to credit slippage (318)

units.translation_target_text: and updates to the model used to calculate expected credit losses; as well as U.S. entities ($1.652 billion) and Mexican entities ($1.069 billion). (16 10)

units.translation_target_text: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$28.9 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$20 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.
